title: TritonParse Compilation Event
description: Event emitted when a Triton kernel is compiled. Contains kernel metadata, IR file contents, and source information.

pid.description: Process ID that compiled the kernel.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the compilation event.

stack.description: Call stack trace at the time of compilation.

payload.description: Compilation data including metadata, IR files, and source.

occurrence_id.description: Global ordering index across all events (added during processing).

is_fake.description: True if this is a synthetic compilation event inferred from launch data.

fake_reason.description: Explanation of why a fake compilation was created.

StackFrame.description: A single frame in the call stack.

line.description: Line number in the source file.

Payload.description: Compilation payload containing metadata, IR content, and source.

metadata.description: Compilation configuration and metadata. Most fields are defined by Triton and may vary across versions.

hash.description: Unique kernel hash identifying this compilation.

cache_hit.description: Whether this compilation was a cache hit.

num_warps.description: Number of warps per CTA (post-expansion for warp-specialized kernels).

num_warps_base.description: Original num_warps before warp specialization expansion. Only present when different from num_warps.

num_ctas.description: Number of CTAs in a cluster.

times.description: Per-phase compilation timing information. Values may be numbers (nanoseconds) or lists of per-stage timings.

file_content.description: IR file contents keyed by filename (e.g., 'add_kernel.ttir', 'add_kernel.ptx').

file_path.description: Paths to IR artifact files on disk.

python_source.description: Python source code of the Triton kernel function.

source_mappings.description: IR-to-source-code line mappings keyed by IR type (added during processing).

ir_stages.description: Ordered list of IR compilation stages for this kernel, resolved from the backend adapter.

PythonSource.description: Python source code of the Triton kernel.

file_path.description: Path to the Python source file.

start_line.description: Start line of the kernel function.

end_line.description: End line of the kernel function.

IRStage.description: Metadata for a single IR compilation stage.

extension.description: File extension for this stage's IR artifact (e.g., '.ttir', '.ptx').

display_name.description: Human-readable stage name for UI display.

display_order.description: Order in which to display this stage relative to others.

is_text.description: Whether the IR content is human-readable text.

supports_source_mapping.description: Whether this stage supports source-to-IR line mapping.

syntax_id.description: Identifier for the syntax highlighting mode to use.
